ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_is_winner" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the home team won */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the league was founded */,
  "league_location" TEXT /* Location where the league is based */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport the league belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "sport_description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "sport_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the sport's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds" (
  "odd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the odd belongs to */,
  "odd_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odd type (e.g., moneyline, point spread) */,
  "odd_value" REAL /* Value of the odd */,
  "odd_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the odd was recorded */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odds provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_odd_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("odd_type_id") REFERENCES odd_types ("odd_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odd_types" (
  "odd_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odd type */,
  "odd_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the odd type */,
  "odd_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the odd type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odd_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted winner */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_outcomes" (
  "betting_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each betting outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the betting outcome belongs to */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_win" REAL /* Amount won or lost */,
  "outcome_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was recorded */,
  "bettor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bettor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("betting_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_outcomes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_outcomes_bettor_id FOREIGN KEY ("bettor_id") REFERENCES bettors ("bettor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bankrolls" (
  "bankroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bankroll */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the bankroll belongs to */,
  "current_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the bankroll */,
  "initial_balance" REAL /* Initial balance of the bankroll */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bankroll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bankroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bankrolls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bettors" (
  "bettor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bettor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the bettor belongs to */,
  "bettor_name" TEXT /* Name of the bettor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bettor was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the bettor's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bettor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bettors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bets" (
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the bet belongs to */,
  "bettor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bettor who made the bet */,
  "bet_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bet */,
  "bet_type" TEXT /* Type of the bet (e.g., moneyline, point spread) */,
  "bet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bet was placed */,
  "bet_odd_id" INTEGER /* ID of the odd the bet was placed on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bettor_id FOREIGN KEY ("bettor_id") REFERENCES bettors ("bettor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bets_bet_odd_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_odd_id") REFERENCES odds ("odd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bet_results" (
  "bet_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bet result */,
  "bet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bet the result belongs to */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the bet (e.g., win, loss, push) */,
  "result_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bet_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bet_results_bet_id FOREIGN KEY ("bet_id") REFERENCES bets ("bet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_won_lost" (
  "game_won_lost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game won/lost record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the record belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_won_lost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_won_lost_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bettor_win_loss" (
  "bettor_win_loss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bettor win/loss record */,
  "bettor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bettor the record belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the bettor */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the bettor */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the record belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bettor_win_loss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bettor_win_loss_bettor_id FOREIGN KEY ("bettor_id") REFERENCES bettors ("bettor_id")
)
